name: Masoor Dal
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the red lentils and add them to a pot with salt and water. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until the lentils are tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Heat a skillet over medium heat and add oil.
4. Add all of the spices (turmeric, ground cumin, coriander, ground ginger, cayenne) and cook until mustard seeds begin to pop.
5. Slowly pour the cooked lentils (with water) into the skillet with the spices. Stir to combine.
6. Simmer gently, stirring often, until the dal thickens to the consistency of refried beans.
7. Serve hot. About 6 servings.
